# DeskSetupPicks

> Independent, data-backed reviews of desk-setup gear. Every product is tested for at least 30 days and only items rated 4.5★ or higher make our lists. We participate in the Amazon Associates program; links may earn a commission at no cost to you.

DeskSetupPicks is an editorial review publication covering 20 categories of workspace gear — standing desks, ergonomic chairs, monitors, keyboards, mice, webcams, microphones, speakers, lighting, and accessories. Reviews include editorial ratings, pros and cons, specifications, and current pricing.

## Reviews (by category)
- [Standing Desks](https://desksetuppicks.com/reviews/standing-desks/)
- [Ergonomic Chairs](https://desksetuppicks.com/reviews/ergonomic-chairs/)
- [Monitors](https://desksetuppicks.com/reviews/monitors/)
- [Monitor Arms](https://desksetuppicks.com/reviews/monitor-arms/)
- [Mechanical Keyboards](https://desksetuppicks.com/reviews/keyboards/)
- [Wireless Mice](https://desksetuppicks.com/reviews/mice/)
- [Webcams](https://desksetuppicks.com/reviews/webcams/)
- [Microphones](https://desksetuppicks.com/reviews/microphones/)
- [Desktop Speakers](https://desksetuppicks.com/reviews/speakers/)
- [Desk Lighting](https://desksetuppicks.com/reviews/lighting/)
- [Headsets & Headphones](https://desksetuppicks.com/reviews/headsets/)
- [USB Hubs & Docks](https://desksetuppicks.com/reviews/usb-hubs/)
- [Desk Mats](https://desksetuppicks.com/reviews/desk-mats/)
- [Desk Shelves & Risers](https://desksetuppicks.com/reviews/desk-shelves/)
- [Laptop Stands](https://desksetuppicks.com/reviews/laptop-stands/)
- [Desk Organizers](https://desksetuppicks.com/reviews/desk-organizers/)
- [Power Strips & Surge Protectors](https://desksetuppicks.com/reviews/power-strips/)
- [Cable Management](https://desksetuppicks.com/reviews/cable-management/)
- [Footrests](https://desksetuppicks.com/reviews/footrests/)
- [Wrist Rests](https://desksetuppicks.com/reviews/wrist-rests/)
